claim: Mutant mice lacking SVCT2 have greatly increased ascorbic acid levels in both brain and adrenals.
evidence_sentences: Ascorbic-acid levels were undetectable or markedly reduced in the blood and tissues of Slc23a1−/− mice.

Brain hemorrhage was unlikely to be simply a form of scurvy since Slc23a1−/− mice showed no hemorrhage in any other tissues and their skin had normal skin 4-hydroxyproline levels despite low ascorbic-acid content.
